Welcome to the Official Square Bear Website
If you are looking for Square Bear Music to create your own song, please click the image below

 Here, you can find out information about the UK dance/trance producer Square Bear.
Square Bear has been producing trance and dance since 1998. His styles vary from commercial, vocal trance to hard banging dance music.

On this site you can find out information about the history of Square Bear, listen to his dance tracks, read his latest news and reviews, check out the photos in the gallery, play online games and more.

His new tracks will appear as exclusive previews here first, before appearing on any other website.

Enjoy your visit to Square Bear's corner of the internet.

 

  Web-site created by S.Worswick using MS Word. Best viewed at 1024x768 and using Internet Explorer
Please note that there are NO pop-up adverts at all on this site. If your browser is displaying any, then I'm afraid you have spyware installed on your PC. You should run Adaware or Spybot Search and Destroy to remove it. Both are available for free on the net.
